exemplar.title:
What is the difference volumes found using volumes of rotation, integral
calculus and water displacement (observed volume) versus basic 3D shape volume formulas (expected volume) when used on a Dyson Hairdryer?

subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Logical progression with clear signposting between observed and expected calculations
Comprehensive table of contents and labelled sections aiding navigation
Well-organized structure with clear introduction, methods, results and conclusion
weaknesses: Minor pagination and spacing glitches interrupt reading flow
Inconsistent figure captions and citation formatting
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Strand assessments place the exploration solidly in band 3 for coherence and organization, with smooth logical development and good structure. Redundant steps (e.g. full binomial expansion) prevent it from being âhighly conciseâ, so a score of 3/4 accurately reflects the clear but not exceptional presentation.

strengths: Generally consistent and correct use of mathematical notation and units
Effective use of multiple representations (tables, photos with annotations, regression graphs)
Clear logical structure with step-by-step explanations and good transitions
weaknesses: Minor formatting slips in subscripts/superscripts and unit notation
Inconsistent styling of variables (bold vs standard)
Some representations (scaling diagrams) could be clearer and headers more explicit
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three strands met the descriptors for band 3: notation is mostly consistent, multiple representations are effective, and communication is clear and logical. Occasional notation inconsistencies and layout hiccups prevent a band 4, so a 3/4 is warranted.

strengths: Choice of a personal object and self-taken photographs demonstrate genuine engagement
Use of regression and water-displacement shows initiative beyond textbook exercises
Proposed extensions (3D scanning, additional attachments) reflect further curiosity
weaknesses: Methods largely follow standard textbook procedures rather than novel design
Lacks distinctive flair or highly innovative modelling
Engagement, while clear, does not reach an exceptional personal approach
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Significant evidence of independent thinking and a clear personal approach place this work in band 2. The exploration shows creativity and initiative but not to the level of outstanding or highly innovative, so a score of 2/3 is appropriate.

strengths: Thoughtful identification of experimental limitations (tape-measure precision, bubbles)
Meaningful evaluation of percentage error and suggestions for future improvements
Clear reflection on method suitability and outcomes
weaknesses: Analysis remains surface-level without probing model sensitivity in depth
Critical discussion of rÂ² values and uncertainty could be expanded
Evaluation does not fully explore mathematical implications or future directions
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Strands show meaningful reflection and basic critical analysis consistent with band 2. While limitations and future improvements are noted, the reflection lacks the depth and comprehensive insight required for band 3, so 2/3 is justified.

strengths: Relevant mathematics (integration, regression, error analysis) is applied effectively
SL-level techniques are consistently used and match course expectations
Sound conceptual understanding demonstrated through coherent compound-volume summation
weaknesses: Some arithmetic and unit inconsistencies (mmÂ³ vs mm3) and mis-copied limits
Simplifications (straight-line handle model) leave aspects unaddressed
Not all suggested verifications (e.g. rotation method) were pursued
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Relevant mathematics is used effectively and at the appropriate course level, meriting band 4. Minor errors and routine rather than expert application prevent a higher band, so 4/6 accurately reflects solid but not comprehensive or expert use.

strandSelections.reasoning: Explanations proceed step-by-step, and transitions between observed and expected methods are explicit.  Occasional layout hiccups aside, the mathematical argument remains readable and logically structured, meriting the âgood/clearâ band.

Workings demonstrate good conceptual grasp, but noticeable inaccuracies arise: inconsistent scaling factors, mis-copied integration limits, and unit slips (mm3 vs mmÂ³).  These constitute more than âminor slipsâ yet the majority of calculations are sensible and logically followed, placing understanding in the 3-mark band.

The student employs tables, photographs with annotated measurements, Desmos graphs, and algebraic working.  These multiple representations are clearly linked to the narrative, though scaling diagrams could be clearer; overall use is effective rather than outstanding.

The exploration follows a logical sequence (introduction â aim â definitions â methods â results â comparison â conclusion).  Cross-referencing between âobservedâ and âexpectedâ sections is clear, and the student regularly signposts where each volume contributes to the total.  Minor lapses (e.g., sudden line breaks, duplicated headings) prevent the work from feeling âhighly coherent,â but overall progression is smooth and arguments build on one another.

Using regression to obtain integrable functions and devising a home-made displacement test illustrates creativity and initiative, but these are standard experimental techniques; the exploration does not reach âexceptional creativity.â

Limitations (tape-measure precision, bubble formation, scaling) are identified and linked to the 10.89 % discrepancy.  Analysis is thoughtful but not deep; there is little probing of the mathematical modelâs validity or sensitivity, so the strand stays in band 2.

The student evaluates outcomes via a comparison table and suggests better equipment and 3-D scanning as future improvements.  While clear, this evaluation does not extend to comprehensive future implications of the mathematics, matching the mid-band descriptor.

The student reflects on percentage error, measurement uncertainty and method suitability, demonstrating meaningful reflection, yet the discussion remains surface-level and largely descriptive rather than deeply critical.

Variables, integrals and units are generally written with correct notation (e.g., V = â«Ï(f(x))Â²dx, mmÂ³).  Minor formatting slips (mm3, inconsistent boldface, lost sub-/superscripts) occur but do not impede meaning, so language is "mostly consistent."

The write-up clearly reflects the studentâs own approach (self-taken photos, choice of Desmos modelling, water-displacement experiment).  While personalised, it lacks the distinctive flair or novel modelling that would move it into the highest band.

Most content is relevant, but several derivations (full binomial expansion, re-writing standard integrals, repeated scaling explanations) could have been condensed.  At 20 pages, the exploration contains noticeable redundancy that lessens conciseness, placing it in the âmostly relevantâ rather than âconciseâ band.

Integration, regression, scaling, percentage error and geometric formulae are all directly relevant to the aim and applied effectively.  Coverage is broad but not exhaustiveâcertain simplifications (straight-line model for handle) leave some aspects unaddressedâso the work fits the âused effectivelyâ band rather than âcomprehensivelyâ.

Selecting a personal object and deciding to compare three volume-finding techniques shows significant independent planning, but major methods closely follow textbook procedures; therefore evidence is âsignificantâ rather than âoutstanding.â

A title page, table of contents, labelled sections, figures and tables demonstrate good organisation.  Each main stage begins on a new page and subsections are clearly labelled (i, ii, iii â¦).  However, some images are inserted mid-sentence and occasional pagination glitches break the reading flow, so the structure is not âexceptionallyâ polished.

Integral calculus, regression and error analysis are solidly at SL level.  The mathematical level matches the syllabus throughout; however, techniques remain routine and do not push into âwell-appliedâ or âexpertâ territory, so 4 / 6 is appropriate.

annotations.comment: The table of contents is comprehensive and clearly structured, aiding navigation between sections effectively.
Spacing in the table of contents appears irregular; consider adjusting line heights or column widths to improve visual coherence.
The opening description situates the exploration context well, though the paragraph could be more concise by removing minor details about non-modeled parts.
The personal motivation is well-expressed and demonstrates genuine curiosity about applying calculus to a familiar object.
Introduce the integral formula on its own line and define min/max bounds explicitly before proceeding to avoid reader confusion.
The Desmos graph effectively visualizes the regression for the handle; combining photo and plot enhances understanding.
The low rÂ² for the handle regression suggests poor fit; reflect on whether linear modelling was appropriate here.
The stated aim ends abruptly mid-sentence; ensure the full aim is presented clearly to guide the investigation.
Notation in the definitions section is generally clear, but subscripts and formatting vary; maintain consistent styling for variables like VTotal.
Unit conversion is correctly stated but could be formatted in a standalone equation block to enhance clarity.
The measurement method is described clearly, but include estimated uncertainties (e.g., Â±1 mm) to reflect precision limits.
Segmented measurements and dimensions are presented systematically, which supports replicability of the method.
Figure lacks a numbered caption; add âFigure 1:â with a descriptive title to conform to academic presentation standards.
Section header clearly signals the start of observed volume calculations, aiding logical progression.
Text refers to handle in head section â revise wording to ensure each description matches the component being analyzed.
When expanding the squared polynomial, consistently include the differential âdxâ in each integral to reinforce proper notation.
Clarify the step removing Ï outside the integral; a brief note on factorization helps avoid misinterpretation.
Units are sometimes written as mm3 instead of mmÂ³; standardize superscripts throughout to avoid ambiguity.
Consider cross-verifying the hollow inner cylinder volume via rotation or displacement to strengthen reliability of the subtraction.
Summarizing the three displacement trials in a small table would improve clarity and aid subsequent calculations.
The average water displacement calculation is straightforward and accurately applies the mean formula.
The summation of compound volumes logically brings together the components, demonstrating coherent methodology.
The integral setup equation is correct and clearly formatted, demonstrating solid mathematical communication.
The full binomial expansion is verbose; consider summarizing or moving detailed algebraic steps to an appendix for conciseness.
Specify the numeric values for the integration limits when referencing âminâ and âmaxâ to make the scaling formula immediately actionable.
The Desmos-derived quartic regression for the head is effectively presented alongside its rÂ² value, demonstrating good use of technology.
Check the arithmetic in the total volume summation; one component seems to use the observed handle volume instead of the scaled value.
Transition to expected calculations is well-marked, supporting coherent progression between experimental and theoretical methods.
Circumference derivation is correctly executed; consider noting the approximation impact when carrying Ï through.
Variable formatting for r changes between bold and standard; maintain consistent notation in equations and text.
The comparison table efficiently juxtaposes observed and theoretical volumes, aiding quantitative evaluation.
Second row headers are blank; label columns with clear titles (e.g., Observed vs Theoretical) to avoid reader confusion.
The percentage error is calculated clearly and correctly, effectively quantifying method discrepancy.
The reflection on error sources truncates mid-discussion; expand with critical insight into model sensitivity and assumptions.
Limitations are thoughtfully identified (tape measure, bubbles), demonstrating meaningful critical reflection.
The extension proposes innovative approaches (3D scanning, additional attachments) that show initiative for further study.
Works cited entries lack uniform formatting; apply consistent citation style and include full URLs for online sources.
